name: Snickerdoodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease a cookie sheet with butter or margarine.
3. In a large bowl, beat together the butter and brown sugar until light and fluffy. Add the granulated sugar; mix well.
4. Add eggs; mix thoroughly.
5. In a medium bowl, combine flour, oats, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt (if using). Mix well.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the sugar mixture; mix gently.
7. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto the prepared cookie sheet.
8. Sprinkle each cookie lightly with 1 tablespoon granulated sugar and 1 tsp cinnamon.
9. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes.
10. Allow cookies to cool for 1 minute on the baking sheet before transferring them to a wire cooling rack.
